name: truecopy-mcp-image
description: Dependency set for the truecopy-mcp container image (Dockerfile). Not published; exists so the image installs from a hash-pinned lockfile via `npm ci` instead of an unpinned `npm i <pkg>@<version>`.

comments.truecopy: Git+SHA pinned, not the npm registry — the last published version (0.9.0) predates standalone MCP mode (#95), which this image now runs. Same pinning mechanism already used below for redstamp. Swap back to a registry range once a release carrying #95 is published.
